items.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
items.summary: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

items.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
items.summary: Two children, aged 11 and 15, were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

items.title: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
items.summary: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 英國官員證實　伊朗攻擊印度洋英美基地未遂
items.summary: 一名英國官員今天向法新社證實，伊朗試圖攻擊位於印度洋狄耶戈加西亞島上的英美聯合軍事基地但「未能成功」。「華爾街日報」先前報導，德黑蘭當局朝該基地發射了兩枚彈道飛彈。  狄耶戈加西亞（Dieg...…

items.title: 伊朗總統：美以立即停止侵略才能結束戰爭
items.summary: 伊朗駐印度大使館今天在社群平台X發文寫道，伊朗總統裴澤斯基安指出，美國和以色列的侵略行動必須「立即停止」，才能結束戰爭以及更廣泛的區域衝突。  路透社報導，裴澤斯基安（Masoud Peze...…

items.title: 「川習會」陷僵局！ 傳待伊朗戰事降溫  川普政府才願安排
